welcomeSubText: I made this specially just for you, for moments when you're mad. Take a deep breath, read slowly, and check what I made for you 🩷
letterBody:
My Dearest Kuchupuchu,

I'm sorry for the moments I hurt you. You mean everything to me — and I just want your smile back. 🩷

With all my love — Your Madam Ji 🩷
